_comment: Copy this file to .claude/inputs/{slug}.json and fill in every field. Do not leave placeholders.
university_name: REQUIRED — display name, e.g. 'Sikkim Manipal University'
university_short_name: OPTIONAL — abbreviation used in title, e.g. 'SMU'
programme_full_name: REQUIRED — e.g. 'Online MBA with Dual Specialization'
target_keyword: REQUIRED — single phrase, e.g. 'SMU online MBA review'
official_portal_url: REQUIRED — the authoritative programme page on the university's or Online Manipal's site
current_blog_url: OPTIONAL — if rewriting an existing EdifyEdu blog, paste the live URL

fees_override._comment: OPTIONAL — if you have verified fees that differ from the portal, put them here. The command will cross-check.

category: REQUIRED — one of: 'Online MBA Programs', 'Online MCA Programs', 'Online BBA Programs', 'Online BCA Programs', 'Distance Education', 'University Reviews'
unique_angles_to_prioritise: OPTIONAL — if you have specific angles in mind, list them here. Otherwise the command picks from the menu.
internal_links_to_include: OPTIONAL — if you want specific Edify pages linked, list them here. Otherwise the command picks from the allowed list.
skip_sections: OPTIONAL — if a section doesn't apply to this programme, list section names here
